settings.heading: Processing Time
settings.row_content: Orders are processed within 2–4 business days. During peak seasons or holidays, processing may take slightly longer.

settings.heading: Shipping Time
settings.row_content: Standard shipping typically takes 5–8 business days depending on your location. You’ll receive a tracking number once your order ships.

settings.heading: Shipping Rates
settings.row_content: Shipping is calculated at checkout based on your location and order total. We occasionally offer free shipping promotions—sign up for our newsletter to stay updated!

settings.heading: Currently Shipping To
settings.row_content:
United States (continental U.S. only at this time).

Please double-check your shipping address—Villa Bodrum is not responsible for orders delivered to incorrect addresses provided at checkout.

settings.heading: Returns Policy
settings.row_content:
Within 14 days of delivery for unused, undamaged items in original packaging.
Customers are responsible for return shipping costs unless the item was damaged or incorrect.

settings.heading: How to Start a Return
settings.row_content: Email us at info@villa-bodrum.com with your order number and the reason for return. We’ll respond with next steps.

settings.heading: Refunds
settings.row_content: Once your return is received and inspected, we’ll issue a refund to your original payment method within 5–7 business days.

settings.heading: Exchanges
settings.row_content: At this time, we do not offer direct exchanges. Please return your item and place a new order.

settings.heading: Final Sale Items
settings.row_content: All sale, personalized, or seasonal items are final sale and cannot be returned.

settings.text: We're here to support you. Please, reach out to us.
